Speaker 1: Hi. Anybody know a good tailor?
Speaker 2: Needs some clothes altered?
Speaker 1: No, no, I'm just looking for a man to draw on me with chalk.
Speaker 2: Why don't you go see Frankie? My family's been goin' to him forever. He did my first suit when I was 15. No wait, 16. No, 'scuse me, 15. All right, when was 1990?
Speaker 1: You have to stop the Q-tip when there's resistance!
